name: The Zombie Neighborhood
short_description: Shoot zombies to relieve stress and go back to sleep. Nothing like a peaceful life in the countryside... Forgetting that they were once people helps ease the anxiety. It feels less guilty blowing the brains out of a "non-human".
detailed_description:
Welcome to the zombie apocalypse experience of a lifetime – and now worse than ever!

The true, realistic and solitary experience of surviving a zombie apocalypse.

"Shoot zombies to relieve stress and go back to sleep. Nothing like a peaceful life in the countryside... Forgetting that they were once people helps ease the anxiety. It feels less guilty blowing the brains out of a non-human".

Tirelessly kill zombies to the sound of classical music, nothing else.
This is the worst zombie neighborhood!

You have been warned...
